titleStmt.title: SII 8.452: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 452. (A.R. Nos. 159 and 160 of 1903). ON THE NORTH AND WEST WALLS OF THE SAME TEMPLE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . parāntakavaḷanāṭṭu māṟamaṅkalamāṉa de ventira[ vallapacaturvve] ti- maṅkalattu ma hāsabhai yom maṟke perumāḷ tiruvaṭippiṭikkum nampimār kaṇṭu śrīvirapāṇḍyade vaṟku yāṇṭu 10 1vatu Aṟ
pikaimātam Ivvūrt tiruviṭaiyāṭṭam tāṅkaḷ Aṉupavittuvarukiṟa nilattukku Innāḷmutal vari niṅkal sāda ñ ceytaruḷiṉa tirumukattiṉpaṭiy kaittaṭippaṭi Aṟukamaṅkalam cuntarapāṇṭiyaṉ peruvatikku meṟku naraciṅkap
peruvāykkālukkut teṟku mutaṟ(k)kaṇṇāṟṟu mutaṟcey viṣu vayaṉa samkra- mappuṟam Aṉantaṉ colaikoṇṭi �ṇi muntirikaiyum puḷiṅkaḷam cuntarapāṇṭiyaṉ peruvatikkuk kiḻakku naraciṅkapperuvāykkālukku teṟku mutaṟkaṇṇāṟṟu Iraṇ
ṭāñ cey tirumañcaṉappuṟam perāḻikoṇṭiṭṭa nilam kāṇi muntirikaiyum muṉṟāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu Iraṇṭāñ cey yāṭṭam pokalūr tevāṇṭār koṇṭiṭṭa nilam mukkāṇi muntirikaiyum Āṟāñ cey capaiyāriṭṭa nilam meḻimaṭakku nila
m Orumāvum Eḻāñ cey Arcca ṉāvirutti meṟpaṭiyār Iṭṭanilam Araimā Araikkāṇiyum Añcāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu mutaṟ cey capaiyār Iṭṭa nilam villi cey nilam Araimā Araikkāṇi kiḻaraiyum Āṟāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu Āṟāñcey tirununtāviḷakkuppuṟam puṉitaṉ
colai koṇṭiṭṭa nilam mukkāṇiyum Atiraviciyāṭuvāṉukkuk kiḻakku mutaṟ kaṇṇāṟṟu Āṟāñcey caṅkavaṭṭakai tirunantavaṉappuṟam sabhai yāriṭṭa nilam kāṇi muntirikaiyiṉkālum Iraṇṭāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu Eḻāñcey vācalaṟai sabh Aiyāriṭṭa nilam Araimā
muntirikaiyum Itaṉ kiḻakku muṅkiṟkuṭṭam sabh Aiyāriṭṭa nilam muntirikaiyiṉ kālum muṉṟāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu Eṭṭāñ ceyum Oṉpatāñ ceyk kuṟaiyum teṟkil vacakkiluṭpaṭa sabh Aiyāriṭṭa nilam Iraṇṭumāvum Iraṇṭāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu Āṟāñ cey nilam muntirikaiyu
m nālāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu Aiñcāñcey koṟṟiyammai koṇṭiṭṭa nilam Araimāvum Eḻāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu mutaṟcey poṉmuṟi sabh Aiyāriṭṭa nilam kāṇik kiḻaraiyum caṅkavaṭṭaṉkāral sabh Aiyāriṭṭa nilamn mutirikaiyum Eṭṭāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu mutaṟceyyum Iraṇṭāñ
ceyyum veṇṇaikkūttaviḷākam mātavāṇṭār koṇṭiṭṭa nilam Orumā Araikkāṇi muntirikaik kiḻaraiyum vaḷḷaippāṭu mutaṟ kaṇṇāṟṟu Iraṇṭāñ cey Uyyakkoṇṭāḻvār tiruviṭaiyāṭṭam tiruvirāmiśva raṉ kecavaṉ koṇṭiṭṭa
nilam kāṇi yaraikkāṇiyum puṟaṅkarai cuntarapāṇṭiyaṉ peruvatikkuk kiḻakku muṉṟāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu nālāñ cey Amāvāsi ppuṟam Ariyeṟucuntaraṉ koṇṭiṭṭa nilam mukkāṇi Araikkāṇi muntirikaiyum kulacekaraviṇṇakar Emperumāṉ tiruviṭaiyāṭṭam puḷiṅkaḷam nālā
ṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu mutaṟcey colaiyaraicu puruṣottamaṉ koṇṭiṭṭa nirnilam Oru māvum vaḷḷaippāṭu mutaṟ kaṇṇāṟṟu mutaṟcey meṟpaṭiyār koṇṭiṭṭa nilam Orumāvum Iraṇṭāñcey meṟpaṭiyār koṇṭiṭṭa nilam Araikkāṇiyum Ūrukku kiḻakku tiruvāykkulaviḷā
kam meṟpaṭiyār koṇṭiṭṭa nilam kāṇi yaraikkāṇiyum maturotayaviṇṇakar Emperumāṉ tiruviṭaiyāṭṭam vaḷḷaippāṭu muṉṟāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu nālāñ cey paṉaiyaṟaināyaṉār koṇṭiṭṭa nilam Araikkāṇi muntirikaiyiṉ kiḻaraiyum pattāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu Aiñcāñce
sabh Aiyār Iṭṭa nilam mukkāṇi yaraikkāṇiyum kuḷattūrvāy nāṟṟaṅkāl nilam kiḻaraiyum Āka nirnilam Araiye nālumā Araikkāṇi muntirikaiyiṉ kiḻ mukkālum Ivvūr vaṭapiṭākai karuñcey kaṉavilvantaperumāḷ nārācattukku vaṭakku cuntarapāṇṭiyaṉ peruvatikku meṟkum kiḻakkum kūttaṉ comaṉātaṉ koṉṭiṭṭa nilam Iraṇṭe nālumāvum kulacekaraviṇṇakar Emperumāṉ tiruviṭaiyāṭṭa nilam Orumāvum mucalvaḷarcoṭṭaik karuñcey maturotayaviṇṇa mperumāṉ tiruviṭaiyāṭṭam nilam Oṉṟum Āka nilam muṉṟe nālumā
The stones containing lines 13 to 18 are not in order. The inscription has been read here in proper sequence.

Āka nirnilamuṅ karuñceyum Uṭpaṭa nilam muṉṟe mukkāle muṉṟumā varaikkāṇi muntirikaik kiḻmukkālum vaṇṭuvarāpatinampi koṇṭiṭṭa nilam Oṉṟum Eṅkaḷ kārāṇmai Uṭpaṭa prasāda ñceytaruḷiṉa tirumukattiṉpaṭiyile puravilum piṟittukkuṭuttom . Inniyohattiṉ[ paṭi ca] ndrāditya vaṟ celvatāka nāṉkellaikaḷilum Ittaṭippaṭa tiruvāḻikkallu nāṭṭik kallilum cempilum veṭṭikkoḷka:—ivai Iṟaivāṉaraiyūr colaippirāṉ periyanampiyāṉa Avaṉinārāyaṇa brahmā tarāyaṉ . Eḻuttu Ivai puṇṭavarddha nattu bṛhaspati savaiyāji kecavaṉāṉa civakalliyāṇanam
pi Eḻuttu . Ivai śrīpokalūr comaṉātaṉ periyanampiyāṉa Irājanārāyaṇa brahmā tarāyaṉ Eḻuttu . Ivai śrīpokalūr colaiyaraicu kūttaṉāṉa cuntarapāṇṭiya brahmāta rāyaṉ Eḻuttu . Ivai Iṟaivaāṉaraiyūr periyanampi puruṣottamaṉāṉa vaṇṭuvarāpatimaṉṉaṉ Eḻuttu . Ivai śrīpuṇṭavaddha ṉattu Aḻakar comaṉātaṉāṉa Aṉṉatāṉanampi Eḻuttu . Ivai mārāyamaṅkalattu Irāmatevaṉ kūttaṉāṉa ceyyapāṇṭiya brahmā tarāyaṉ Eḻuttu . Ivai śrīpokalūr colaiyaraicu periyanampiyāṉa kumaranārāyaṇa brahmāta rāyaṉ Eḻuttu . Iv[ai śrī]
pokalūr colaiyaraicu karumāṇikkamāṉa tiyākaviṉota brahmāta rāyaṉ Eḻuttu . Ivai śrīpokalūr kūttaṉ periyanampiyāṉa karuṇākaranampi Eḻuttu . Ivai Iṟaivāṉaraiyūṟ centāmaraikkaṇṇaṉ cūriyatevaṉāṉa teventirap piramātarāyaṉ Eḻuttu . Ivai cipokalūr citaraṉ cikaiyilāsamuṭaiyāṉāṉa civallapappiramātarāyaṉ Eḻuttu . Ivai śrīpokalūr mātavaṉ kūttaṉāṉa poṟkoyilnampi Eḻuttu . Ivai cipuṇṭavarddha ṉattu kūttaṉ civallavaṉāṉa teṉṉavaṉ piramātarāyaṉ Eḻuttu . Ivai maārāyamaṅkalattu kūttaṉ vāsude vaṉāṉa vāṉavaṉ brahmā
ta rāyaṉ Eḻuttu . Ivai cipokalūr poṉṉampi poliñcuniṉṟāṉāṉa Ākavarāmanampi Eḻuttu . Ivai maārācamaṅkalattu maṇavāḷaṉ mātavaṉāṉa mayileṟumperumāḷnampi Eḻuttu . Ivai maārācamaṅkalattu cuvāminampi colaippirāṉāṉa Aruḷāḷapperumāḷnampi Eḻuttu . Ivai maārāyamaṅkalattu Irāmatevaṉ mātavaṉāṉa tiruvātavūrnampi Eḻuttu . Ivai cipokalūr kūttaṉ naṅkaiyāḻvāṉāṉa nāṟpatteṇṇāyiranampi Eḻuttu .:—ivai cipokalūr kaḷḷappirāṉ tiruppūvaṉamuṭ[aiyā*] ṉāṉa tiruñāṉacampantanampi Eḻuttu:—ivai Iṟaivāṉaraiyūr puru
ṣottamaṉ citaraṉāṉa Aḻakiyamaṇavāḷanampi Eḻuttu Ivai cipokalūr mātavaṉ kūttaṉāṉa tillaimuvāyiranampi Eḻuttu . Ivai maārājamaṅkalattu Āṭkoṇṭāṉ centilāṉa viṟṟiruntaperumāḷnampi Eḻuttu—ivai cipokalūr tiruvikkiramaṉ cikayilāsamuṭaiyāṉāṉa tiruuṇṇāḻiynampi Eḻuttu . Ivai maārājamaṅkalattu tiruvaraṅkapperumāḷ tāmotaraṉāṉa tirumāliruñcolainampi Eḻuttu:—ivai śrīpokalūr Aṉantacayaṉaṉ periyaṉampiyāṉa tiruvārurnampi Eḻuttu . Ivai cipuṇṭavattaṉattu Aḻakaṉ pāṇṭiyā pāṇṭiya piramātarāyaṉ Eḻuttu:—
Digital edition of SII 8.452 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
